description: Query logs from Graylog: get streams, search messages, aggregate, and get full data.
name: io.github.jperelli/graylog-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the first Graylog instance, e.g. http://graylog.example.com:9000
environmentVariables.name: GRAYLOG_BASE_URL_INSTANCE_1

environmentVariables.description: API token for the first Graylog instance (used as the HTTP Basic username).
environmentVariables.name: GRAYLOG_API_TOKEN_INSTANCE_1

environmentVariables.description: Optional human-readable label for the first instance (default: instance_1).
environmentVariables.name: GRAYLOG_LABEL_INSTANCE_1

title: Graylog MCP Server
